title: Store home
description: Browse departments, promotions, and entry points into the product catalog.

title: Shopping assistant
description: Search and compare catalog products, inspect product facts, review cart context, and prepare supported shopping actions.

title: Product catalog
description: Browse published products and refine the listing by category, price, rating, brand, and availability.

title: Deals
description: Browse the catalog's current deal-focused listing; final price and coupon eligibility are verified by cart and checkout APIs.

title: Trending products
description: Browse the storefront's trending product listing.

title: New arrivals
description: Browse newly listed catalog products.

title: Category listing
description: Browse products within a named category or department.

title: Product details
description: Inspect canonical price, stock, rating, description, highlights, and specifications for one published product.

title: Catalog search
description: Open the product search results surface for a catalog query.

title: Cart
description: Review selected items, quantities, stock warnings, and the current item subtotal before checkout recalculates the final quote.

title: Wishlist
description: Review products saved for later and move eligible items into the cart.

title: Checkout
description: Validate the live cart quote, address, shipping, taxes, coupon eligibility, and payment choice before placing an order.

title: Orders
description: View user-owned orders, live status, totals, payment state, and eligible order command-center actions.

title: Customer support
description: Open the public support handoff for account, product, order, delivery, return, refund, or warranty issues without inventing an outcome.

title: Product comparison
description: Compare two or more selected catalog products side by side using their canonical product facts.

title: Visual search
description: Use a product image or image URL to find catalog candidates; results still require catalog verification.

title: Product bundles
description: Explore related-product and bundle suggestions grounded in catalog and cart context.

title: Marketplace
description: Browse marketplace listings and seller profiles separately from the main product catalog.

title: Marketplace listing
description: Inspect one marketplace listing and its seller-provided details.

title: Seller profile
description: Inspect a marketplace seller profile and that seller's visible listings.

title: Account profile
description: Manage signed-in account details and reach account support surfaces.

title: Price alerts
description: Review signed-in price alerts for watched products and their configured thresholds.

title: Mission control
description: Open the shopping mission workspace for organizing a guided product-discovery task.

title: Contact
description: Open the public contact surface; account-specific support remains in the signed-in support desk.

title: Trade-in
description: Start the signed-in trade-in flow; eligibility and value must come from the trade-in workflow rather than assistant estimates.

title: Become a seller
description: Apply for seller access from a signed-in account.

title: Create a listing
description: Create a marketplace listing after the account has seller access.

title: My listings
description: Review and manage marketplace listings owned by the signed-in seller.
